title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (97), PAGE 657, TITLE (A) OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 3789 / 57 OG No. 11, 1943 (March 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2861, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (97), PAGE 657, TITLE (A) OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (97), page 657, Title (A) of Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hundred, is amended to read as follows:

"(97) Construction of Cabilauan Barrio School

Home Economics Building, Barotac Nuevo ................. P4, 000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
